ai_recommendations.personalized_advice: To significantly improve your overall performance, focus on addressing the critical weaknesses in System Objectives, Double-Entry Ledger Architecture, Wallet Workflow, Detailed Financial Logic, Database Design, and Key Concepts. Start by reviewing the foundational concepts of each topic, then practice applying them through real-world examples or practice problems. ai_recommendations.learning_strategy: Begin with a thorough review of each weak topic, starting with the most critical ones. Create a schedule that allocates dedicated time for each topic, and use active recall techniques such as flashcards, practice quizzes, or summarizing key concepts in your own words. As you progress, gradually increase the difficulty of practice problems and aim to apply the concepts to real-world scenarios.
